arts.ttl: Chelsea outcast 'is being pushed to AC Milan' amid Aston Villa interest - as agent Jorge Mendes 'flies to London to convince Blues' over loan deal
arts.sum: Jorge Mendes is reportedly pushing the Chelsea outcast to sign with AC Milan ahead of the transfer deadline, although the Italian giants are unwilling to pay his entire salary during the loan.

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive late transfer approach for Joao Felix as defender exit blocked
arts.sum: Chelsea attacker Joao Felix is one player that could move before tonight's transfer deadline and the Blues only have one international loan spot left within their quota

arts.ttl: Six players Chelsea tipped to sign on transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Chelsea continue to be linked to key attacking targets as Enzo Maresca looks to reignite his Premier League title challenge. With lot's of name being dotted around regarding a move to Chelsea, football.london has taken a look at the odds for the Blues' next signing.

arts.ttl: We simulated Chelsea vs West Ham United to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: Chelsea play Monday night football for the second time in three weeks when they face London rivals West Ham United in the Premier League later today. With just one win in their last seven Premier League games, Chelsea will be desperate for three points against West Ham later today.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea prepared to pay £58m to sign Robert Sanchez replacement on transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Chelsea are considering making a very late push to replace Robert Sanchez on transfer deadline day with another goalkeeper being targeted. Sanchez’s performances have been...

arts.ttl: Chelsea outcast Ben Chilwell set to sign for Crystal Palace on loan after playing just 45 minutes under Enzo Maresca this season
arts.sum: Chelsea are looking to offload yet another one of their outcasts on transfer deadline day as Crystal Palace swoop to replace Trevor Chalobah whom the Blues recalled earlier this month

arts.ttl: Report: £70m attacker is preparing to leave on deadline day after links with Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: How do you feel about this, Man United fans?

arts.ttl: “Medical done” – West Ham to complete striker deal on transfer deadline day
arts.sum: West Ham United are set to complete the loan signing of Brighton attacker Evan Ferguson, according to transfer news expert Fabrizio Romano. The Hammers were desperately looking to sign a new attacker and they have managed to do that late in the transfer window. arts.ttl: Chelsea chase TWO more teenagers on transfer deadline day - including a Premier League wonderkid - as the Blues make late effort to HIJACK Bournemouth's deal for £30m-rated star
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in bringing two European prospects - including a rising star from Manchester City - to the Stamford Bridge on the last day of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea beat Premier League rivals to sign young attacker in a £30m deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have been the most active Premier League club when it comes to making signings in recent transfer windows. That’s why it comes as a huge surprise that they have not made any new signing in the winter transfer window.
